steps.title: Track the missing role
steps.content: The passage says vulnerable native plants rely on fruit-eating birds for seed dispersal. Since native fruit-eating birds on Oahu are extinct, the introduced birds now spreading those seeds are filling the same ecological role.

steps.title: Remove unsupported predictions
steps.content: B speculates about risks to non-native birds, and C predicts population growth; neither follows from the passage. D makes an unsupported quantity comparison with extinct native birds. The only supported conclusion is that introduced birds perform a role once filled by native birds. The answer is A.
